issues.detail: The examples only cover happy paths and do not illustrate error handling or edge cases.
The skill is vendor-locked to Mastra, not platform-agnostic.

scenarios.name: Customer support agent with tools
scenarios.rationale: Baseline ignored Mastra entirely and hand-rolled OpenAI tool dispatch; treatment used Agent with openai('gpt-4o') from @mastra/openai, Zod-typed tool parameters, and .generate()/.stream().

scenarios.name: Onboarding workflow with conditional step
scenarios.rationale: Baseline wrote a plain async function with no Workflow abstraction; treatment used Workflow + Step with a when() guard reading previous.validate.isNewCustomer and .execute().
